description_long: This is a low-top, casual sneaker with a predominantly dark gray upper made from a combination of suede and synthetic materials. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with matching gray laces and metal eyelets, and a padded tongue displaying the 'CREEKS' brand label. The side panels are adorned with a stitched chevron-like design, and subtle accent lines run along the heel and collar. The midsole is white and contrasts with the darker upper, while the outsole appears to be made of rubber for traction. The overall design is sleek and urban, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A dark gray, low-top sneaker with a white sole, gray laces, and subtle stitched accents, branded 'CREEKS'. The shoe has a sleek, urban look with a mix of suede and synthetic materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chevron-like stitched design, gray laces, and the 'CREEKS' label on the tongue and side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel collar and the continuous white midsole wrapping around the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the clean, uninterrupted panel and accent stitching, with the laces partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, criss-cross lacing, and the 'CREEKS' label on the tongue.
attribute_logo: Rectangular 'CREEKS' text logo on the tongue in white, small fabric label on the side.
